item.title: agiwhitelist/tokdiet — Local streaming reverse proxy between AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) and model APIs (
item.description: Local streaming reverse proxy between AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex) and model APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, MiniMax).

item.title: haydenbleasel/batchwork — Unified batch API for AI providers. Save up to 50% on LLM costs.
item.description: Unified batch API for AI providers. Save up to 50% on LLM costs.

item.title: wellwelwel/blue-spec — 🌊 Blue Spec is a toolkit for Security-Driven Hardening (SDH), a defensive workflow to help AI agents
item.description: 🌊 Blue Spec is a toolkit for Security-Driven Hardening (SDH), a defensive workflow to help AI agents detect what a system does and harden the defenses that matter.

item.title: liebaojun/MakoCode — MakoCode — 茉子版 Agent | Galgame 风格桌面 AI Agent，零门槛体验 Agent 的乐趣
item.description: MakoCode — 茉子版 Agent | Galgame 风格桌面 AI Agent，零门槛体验 Agent 的乐趣

item.title: yahyambk57-stack/Ai-Object-Isolation-Toolkit — 2026 Next-Gen AI Photo Background Remover & Object Removal Tool
item.description: 2026 Next-Gen AI Photo Background Remover & Object Removal Tool

item.title: Happy-Chen-CH/Educational_RAG_System — 面向教育场景的RAG智能问答系统，融合关键词匹配与语义检索双引擎，融合MySQL和RAG技术，先经过MySQL数据库的检索(还融合了Redis辅助储存和搜索)，若无符合条件答案，则进入RAG系统，RA
item.description: 面向教育场景的RAG智能问答系统，融合关键词匹配与语义检索双引擎，融合MySQL和RAG技术，先经过MySQL数据库的检索(还融合了Redis辅助储存和搜索)，若无符合条件答案，则进入RAG系统，RAG知识库中的知识储存在Milvus向量数据库中

item.title: LichAmnesia/awesome-ad-video-prompts — Curated, original high-craft prompts for AI video ads (Seedance 2.0 / Veo 3 / Kling / Runway). Compa
item.description: Curated, original high-craft prompts for AI video ads (Seedance 2.0 / Veo 3 / Kling / Runway). Companion to HeyDreaming.

item.title: moely-ai/claude-fable-5-prompt — A curated collection of Claude Fable 5 system prompts for developers and researchers. Discover more
item.description: A curated collection of Claude Fable 5 system prompts for developers and researchers. Discover more advanced prompt engineering tools at Moely AI.

item.title: joeseesun/qiaomu-llm-mcp — 把多模型 Provider、本地密钥和 HeavySkill 讨论统一成 MCP 网关 | Local MCP gateway for multi-provider LLM routing, secr
item.description: 把多模型 Provider、本地密钥和 HeavySkill 讨论统一成 MCP 网关 | Local MCP gateway for multi-provider LLM routing, secrets, and HeavySkill discussions.

item.title: Lekien082/AI-Photo-Background-Remover — An easy-to-use desktop utility powered by AI to automatically remove background from photos locally,
item.description: An easy-to-use desktop utility powered by AI to automatically remove background from photos locally, offline, and in high resolution.

item.title: 001TMF/harness-forge — Turn Claude Code into its own Meta-Harness — a skill that evolves the scaffolding around a fixed mod
item.description: Turn Claude Code into its own Meta-Harness — a skill that evolves the scaffolding around a fixed model (memory, retrieval, context, prompts) via a native propose→score→Pareto loop.

item.title: Lolner95/AIGX — Open, MIT context format for AI coding agents: centralized .aigx/ rules + a per-file boundary index
item.description: Open, MIT context format for AI coding agents: centralized .aigx/ rules + a per-file boundary index that targets the right rules, forbidden imports, and gotchas to each file.

item.title: lucidrains/poly-attention — Implementation of Poly-attention, a higher-order self-attention proposed by Chakrabarti et al. of Co
item.description: Implementation of Poly-attention, a higher-order self-attention proposed by Chakrabarti et al. of Columbia

item.description: MaineCoon: Pursuing a Real-Time Audio-Visual Social World Model — technical report & project links. 🌐 https://mainecoon.tech/
